ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battery_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery data record */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp in milliseconds when the data was recorded */,
  "battery_remaining" INTEGER /* Percentage of battery remaining */,
  "battery_power_raw" INTEGER /* Raw battery power consumption in micro-watts */,
  "battery_power_delta" INTEGER /* Change in battery power consumption since the last record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which the data was collected */,
  "battery_voltage" INTEGER /* Current voltage of the battery */,
  "battery_current" INTEGER /* Current flow in or out of the battery */,
  "battery_temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature of the battery */,
  "battery_cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of charge cycles the battery has undergone */,
  "battery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the battery (e.g., charging, discharging, full) */,
  "battery_health" TEXT /* Assessment of the battery's overall health (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_info ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the mobile device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the device */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Nominal capacity of the battery in milliampere-hours (mAh) */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery (e.g., Li-ion, Li-Po) */,
  "battery_model" TEXT /* Model of the battery */,
  "battery_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery for traceability */,
  "battery_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the battery management system (BMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences related to battery notifications and power-saving settings */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp in milliseconds of the last time the user logged into the user-facing application */,
  "account_creation_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp in milliseconds of the date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_info ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the report is generated */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp in milliseconds when the report was generated */,
  "battery_health" TEXT /* Assessment of the battery health */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving battery life */,
  "battery_usage_patterns" TEXT /* Patterns of battery usage (e.g., heavy usage, light usage) */,
  "power_saving_tips" TEXT /* Specific power-saving tips based on the user's usage patterns */,
  "battery_prediction" TEXT /* Predicted remaining battery life based on current usage and historical data */,
  "alert_thresholds" TEXT /* User-defined thresholds for battery alerts (e.g., 20% remaining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
